title: Build Bumper v1 - Hot/Cold Navigation App
description: Build the core Bumper app with haptic navigation guidance toward 180º Shop (Roma Norte). Phases: Services → Minimal Nav → Orb → Destination Entry → Arrival → Polish

title: Phases 1-4 Complete (Foundation → Arrival)
description: All core functionality implemented: Services layer, Navigation math, Orb UI, Destination search, Time constraints, Arrival celebration

title: Live Activity Widget (Lock Screen + Dynamic Island)
description: Real-time navigation status on Lock Screen and Dynamic Island. Zone dot + distance display. Updates every location change. Session 13.

title: Premium Micro-Interactions
description: Lumy-inspired: Pressable buttons with scale+haptic, staggered entrance animations, WanderDial haptic ticks, hero transition (dial→orb), arrival haptic crescendo. Session 11.

title: App Icon Design
description: Fire/wave yin-yang design with red/blue gradient. All required sizes generated. Session 12.

title: Device walk testing and V2 validation
description: Run the V2 walk-test matrix in docs/WALK-TESTS.md. Covers front-pocket haptic legibility, left/right calibration, parallel-street meander, wrong-way behavior, search/ETA quality, tight arrival time, low-confidence behavior, and Live Activity/device checks.
acceptance_criteria: Front-pocket strong corrections are reliably noticeable; left vs right is identifiable within one calibration session; a 15-minute city walk has rare false nudges; search/ETA feel native-quality; Live Activity still syncs distance/zone on device.

title: Run Xcode simulator build and unit tests after iOS 26.4.1 install
description: The V2 app Swift files typecheck, but xcodebuild is blocked while Xcode finishes installing the iOS 26.4.1 simulator/platform. Once the download completes, run the scheme build and unit tests on a concrete iPhone simulator.
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild -scheme bumpers -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' build passes; xcodebuild -scheme bumpers -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' -skip-testing:bumpersUITests test passes, or any remaining failure is captured with exact error output.
close_reason: Simulator build and unit tests passed on iOS 26.4.
